key_insight: ANGLE learns the full conditional distribution of circular responses directly on the circle, avoiding misleading mean-based regression for angular data with multimodal or asymmetric uncertainty.
engineering_relevance: This enables better uncertainty-aware prediction for angle/direction tasks such as pose estimation and wind forecasting, which matter in autonomous systems, surveillance, and energy applications.
method: Generative non-parametric regression on circular targets using a lightweight deep map.
Trains with generalized circular energy score (GCES) to fit the full conditional distribution.
Supports Euclidean and circular covariates, plus pre- and post-additive noise settings.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports extensive simulations and real-world case studies on object pose estimation and wind direction prediction, with superior predictive performance and uncertainty quantification.
watch_item: Practical performance may depend on careful handling of angular data representation and noise assumptions when deploying the generative model.
paper_title: ANGLE: Angular Neural Generative Learning via Engression
